title: Opt in locatorbar
description: Opt in to be visible on the locator bar
body:
# Opt in locator bar

With this mod you as the player can opt in to be visible on the locator bar.

```
/locatorbar <disable | enable> this will enable/disable the locator bar for yourself
```

Example:
This user has locator bars enabled 
![User with enabled locator bar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/OptInLocatorBar/refs/heads/main/images/2025-10-02_20.17.47.png)
This user has locator bars disabled
![User with enabled locator bar](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/lukasabbe/OptInLocatorBar/refs/heads/main/images/2025-10-02_20.17.51.png)
